name: delivery_speed
description: Refers to how fast the product was shipped or arrived.

name: product_satisfaction
description: General expression of happiness or approval with the product.
examples: My daughter is thoroughly happy with this.

name: performance_speed
description: Refers to the processing speed or responsiveness of the device.
examples: The new M1 chip is blazing fast

name: data_transfer
description: Ease of moving data from an old device to the new one.
examples: It was easy to move all my data to the new device

name: device_usage_frequency
description: How often the product is used or handled.
examples: it's pretty much never not in my hand

name: ecosystem_compatibility
description: How well the product integrates with other devices or systems.
examples: Very useful and flexible with my other Mac products.

name: device_syncing
description: Ability to synchronize data with other devices.
examples: It syncs to my MacBook Pro and iPhone 6+.

name: multitasking_capability
description: Ability to run multiple applications simultaneously.
examples: its best at multitasking i mean come on netflix and study ill take it

name: internet_connection_speed
examples: the connection to the internet is fast

name: processing_speed
description: Speed at which the device handles data.
examples: the M1 chip processes data extremely fast

name: performance_reliability
description: Indicates that the product is functioning correctly or meeting expectations.

name: price_competitiveness
description: Refers to the cost of the product relative to similar items on the market.

name: customer_satisfaction
description: Expresses a positive emotional response or high regard for the product.
examples: I’m so excited couldn’t wait for it to get here
